name: io.github.bruchris/canvas-lms-mcp
description: TypeScript MCP server for Canvas LMS — 115 read+write tools across 17 domains.

environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Canvas personal access token (Account → Settings → Approved Integrations → New Access Token)

environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Canvas instance API URL, e.g. https://school.instructure.com/api/v1
